CREATE TABLE strings (s1 VARCHAR, s2 VARCHAR);
SELECT levenshtein(s1, s2) FROM strings WHERE s1 LIKE '%t%' OR s2 LIKE '%d%';
SELECT s1, s2, levenshtein(s1, s2) AS edit_distance FROM strings WHERE levenshtein(s1, s2) > 2;
CREATE TABLE test_results AS SELECT s1, s2, levenshtein(s1, s2) AS edit_distance FROM strings;
WITH cte AS (SELECT levenshtein('abc', 'def') AS distance) SELECT distance FROM cte;
SELECT t1.s1, t2.s2, levenshtein(t1.s1, t2.s2) AS distance FROM strings AS t1 JOIN strings AS t2 ON t1.s1 <> t2.s1 WHERE levenshtein(t1.s1, t2.s2) <= 2;
SELECT s1, s2 FROM strings WHERE levenshtein(s1, s2) IN (SELECT edit_distance FROM test_results WHERE edit_distance < 3);
